fa-frown.appearanceId: a circular face outline with two dot eyes and a curved downward-arching mouth suggesting sadness; round head silhouette with drooping smile line and small circular pupils
fa-frown.functionalityId: indicates a negative reaction or unhappy sentiment; marks feedback or a rating as unfavorable
fa-frown.intentId: express dissatisfaction or a negative emotional response; submit a negative review or reaction

fa-frown-open.appearanceId: a circular face outline with two dot eyes and a wide open downward-curving mouth forming a pronounced frown; round head silhouette with an open-mouthed unhappy expression
fa-frown-open.functionalityId: indicates a strongly negative or distressed reaction; marks feedback as very unhappy or upset
fa-frown-open.intentId: express strong dissatisfaction or distress; convey an extremely negative emotional response

fa-function.appearanceId: a stylized lowercase f-like mathematical function symbol with a curved stem and crossbar resembling a script letter; italic cursive f shape with a horizontal line through the middle
fa-function.functionalityId: represents or inserts a mathematical or programming function; opens a formula or function editor
fa-function.intentId: work with mathematical functions or formulas; access function-related tools in a calculator or code editor

fa-funnel-dollar.appearanceId: a downward-pointing triangular funnel shape with a dollar sign symbol overlaid or embedded within it; inverted triangle filter form combined with a currency symbol
fa-funnel-dollar.functionalityId: filters or sorts items by monetary value or cost; applies a financial criteria to narrow a list of results
fa-funnel-dollar.intentId: filter data by price or financial parameters; narrow results to a specific budget or cost range

fa-futbol.appearanceId: a circle representing a soccer ball with a classic black pentagonal and white hexagonal panel pattern across its surface; spherical ball outline with interlocking polygonal patches
fa-futbol.functionalityId: navigates to a soccer or football sports section; represents a football or futbol game or team
fa-futbol.intentId: access soccer or football-related content or scores; find information about a futbol match or team

fa-g.appearanceId: a single uppercase letter G with a curved open arc and a small horizontal bar extending inward at mid-height; blocky capital G letterform with an inner shelf on the right side
fa-g.functionalityId: represents the letter G as a label or initial; marks a category or item starting with the letter G
fa-g.intentId: label or categorize content starting with G; use the letter G as a shorthand or identifier

fa-galaxy.appearanceId: a spiral galaxy shape with curved arms radiating outward from a bright central core and scattered star dots; swirling disc form with pinwheel arms and a luminous nucleus
fa-galaxy.functionalityId: represents outer space or astronomical content; navigates to a cosmic or space-themed section
fa-galaxy.intentId: explore space or astronomy-related content; access a cosmic or universe-themed feature

fa-gallery-thumbnails.appearanceId: a grid of small rectangular thumbnail boxes arranged in rows and columns with a larger featured image at the top; mosaic layout of preview frames in a structured gallery formation
fa-gallery-thumbnails.functionalityId: switches the view to a thumbnail gallery layout; displays media items as a grid of small previews
fa-gallery-thumbnails.intentId: browse a collection of images or media in thumbnail format; switch to a visual grid layout for a photo gallery

fa-game-board.appearanceId: a square board divided into a grid of smaller squares resembling a checkerboard or game grid with alternating filled cells; flat game surface with a regular checkerboard tile pattern
fa-game-board.functionalityId: opens a board game interface or game grid view; navigates to a turn-based or strategy game board
fa-game-board.intentId: play a board game or strategy game; access a grid-based game interface

fa-game-board-alt.appearanceId: a square board with a grid of cells and a different arrangement of pieces or markers compared to the standard board; game grid surface with an alternative pattern of filled and empty squares
fa-game-board-alt.functionalityId: opens an alternate board game layout or variant game grid; switches to a different game board configuration
fa-game-board-alt.intentId: access an alternative board game mode or layout; play a variant of a grid-based game

fa-game-console-handheld.appearanceId: a rectangular handheld gaming device with a small screen in the center, a directional pad on the left, and action buttons on the right; portable console silhouette with a display and control buttons
fa-game-console-handheld.functionalityId: represents a handheld gaming device or portable game; opens a mobile or portable gaming section
fa-game-console-handheld.intentId: access handheld or portable game content; find games compatible with a handheld console

fa-game-console-handheld-crank.appearanceId: a rectangular handheld console with a small screen, control buttons, and a small side-mounted crank handle protruding from the edge; portable gaming device silhouette with a rotary crank accessory
fa-game-console-handheld-crank.functionalityId: represents a crank-operated handheld gaming device; opens content related to a crank-mechanism portable console
fa-game-console-handheld-crank.intentId: access content for a crank-mechanism handheld game platform; find games or features for a specific crank-based portable device

fa-gamepad.appearanceId: a rounded rectangular game controller with a directional pad on the left, two analog sticks, and action buttons on the right face; classic dual-grip console controller silhouette with button clusters
fa-gamepad.functionalityId: opens a game controller configuration or gaming section; represents video games or a gaming console interface
fa-gamepad.intentId: access gaming features or configure a game controller; navigate to a video game library or gaming hub

fa-gamepad-alt.appearanceId: a rounded game controller outline with a different button layout or grip shape than the standard gamepad, featuring a symmetrical or alternative form; alternate console controller silhouette with a variant design
fa-gamepad-alt.functionalityId: opens an alternate gaming controller configuration or secondary game input settings; represents a variant or alternative game controller
fa-gamepad-alt.intentId: configure an alternative game controller or input device; access a secondary gaming control scheme

fa-garage.appearanceId: a building facade with a peaked roofline and a wide closed rectangular garage door at the base; house-like structure with a large flat-paneled door taking up most of the front face
fa-garage.functionalityId: navigates to a garage or storage space management section; represents a home garage or vehicle storage area
fa-garage.intentId: manage a garage space or home storage area; access information about a vehicle garage

fa-garage-car.appearanceId: a garage building facade with a peaked roof and an open or closed garage door with a small car silhouette visible inside or in front; house structure with a door opening and a vehicle shape within
fa-garage-car.functionalityId: represents a garage with a parked vehicle inside; navigates to a vehicle storage or parking management section
fa-garage-car.intentId: manage a vehicle stored in a garage; access parking or car storage information

fa-garage-open.appearanceId: a garage building facade with a peaked roofline and a fully raised open garage door revealing the interior space; house structure with the large door panel lifted to expose an empty bay
fa-garage-open.functionalityId: indicates an open garage door state; toggles or shows the open status of a garage entrance
fa-garage-open.intentId: check or manage an open garage door; monitor the access state of a garage entry

fa-garlic.appearanceId: a rounded bulb shape with a pointed top and segmented cloves visible around its base, resembling a garlic head; teardrop-shaped vegetable bulb with a tuft of roots and layered outer skin
fa-garlic.functionalityId: tags or categorizes content related to garlic or cooking ingredients; marks a recipe or dish as containing garlic
fa-garlic.intentId: find recipes or content featuring garlic; filter food items by a specific ingredient

fa-gas-pump.appearanceId: a rectangular gas pump body with a nozzle hose hanging off the side and a display panel at the top front; fuel dispenser silhouette with a side-mounted hose and nozzle
fa-gas-pump.functionalityId: indicates a fuel station location or gas price information; marks a fueling stop on a map or route
fa-gas-pump.intentId: find a nearby gas station or fuel stop; track fuel costs or refueling locations

fa-gas-pump-slash.appearanceId: a rectangular gas pump body with a diagonal slash line crossing through the entire shape; fuel dispenser silhouette overlaid with a cancellation or prohibition line
fa-gas-pump-slash.functionalityId: indicates that fueling is unavailable or a gas station is closed; marks a location as out of fuel or inaccessible
fa-gas-pump-slash.intentId: alert the user that fueling is not available at this location; indicate a fuel supply outage or pump unavailability

fa-gauge.appearanceId: a semicircular dial face with tick marks along the arc and a needle pointing to a mid-range position; half-circle speedometer outline with a central pivot needle
fa-gauge.functionalityId: displays a current measurement or performance level on a scale; monitors a real-time metric such as speed or usage
fa-gauge.intentId: monitor system performance or a measured value; check the current level of a tracked metric

fa-gauge-circle-bolt.appearanceId: a semicircular dial face with a needle and a small circle containing a lightning bolt badge overlaid at the lower portion; half-circle gauge with a power or charge indicator badge
fa-gauge-circle-bolt.functionalityId: displays an electrical power or energy metric on a gauge; monitors a charge level or power output reading
fa-gauge-circle-bolt.intentId: monitor electrical power or energy usage on a gauge; check current power charge or battery level

fa-gauge-circle-minus.appearanceId: a semicircular dial face with a needle and a small circle containing a minus sign badge overlaid at the lower portion; half-circle gauge with a reduction or decrease indicator badge
fa-gauge-circle-minus.functionalityId: displays a gauge reading indicating a decrease or reduction; monitors a metric that has been lowered or throttled
fa-gauge-circle-minus.intentId: track a reduction in a measured value; monitor a decrease in system performance or output

fa-gauge-circle-plus.appearanceId: a semicircular dial face with a needle and a small circle containing a plus sign badge overlaid at the lower portion; half-circle gauge with an increase or addition indicator badge
fa-gauge-circle-plus.functionalityId: displays a gauge reading indicating an increase or boost; monitors a metric that has been raised or elevated
fa-gauge-circle-plus.intentId: track an increase in a measured value; monitor a boost in system performance or output

fa-gauge-high.appearanceId: a semicircular dial face with tick marks along the arc and a needle pointing toward the high end of the scale near the right side; half-circle speedometer with a pivot needle deflected to upper range
fa-gauge-high.functionalityId: indicates a high level or elevated reading on a performance scale; alerts to a high usage or above-normal measurement
fa-gauge-high.intentId: monitor a high-level metric or elevated performance value; check if a system measurement is in the high range

fa-gauge-low.appearanceId: a semicircular dial face with tick marks along the arc and a needle pointing toward the low end of the scale near the left side; half-circle speedometer with a pivot needle deflected to lower range
fa-gauge-low.functionalityId: indicates a low level or reduced reading on a performance scale; alerts to a low usage or below-normal measurement
fa-gauge-low.intentId: monitor a low-level metric or reduced performance value; check if a system measurement is in the low range

fa-gauge-max.appearanceId: a semicircular dial face with a needle pinned at the maximum far-right position at the top of the scale arc; half-circle speedometer with the pivot needle pointing to the highest tick mark
fa-gauge-max.functionalityId: indicates a maximum or peak level reading on a scale; marks the upper limit or full capacity of a measured metric
fa-gauge-max.intentId: check if a metric has reached its maximum or peak value; monitor a system at full capacity or upper limit

fa-gauge-min.appearanceId: a semicircular dial face with a needle pinned at the minimum far-left position at the bottom of the scale arc; half-circle speedometer with the pivot needle pointing to the lowest tick mark
fa-gauge-min.functionalityId: indicates a minimum or baseline level reading on a scale; marks the lower limit or empty state of a measured metric
fa-gauge-min.intentId: check if a metric has reached its minimum or baseline value; monitor a system at its lowest or empty state

fa-gauge-simple.appearanceId: a plain semicircular dial outline with a central needle and no tick marks or labels, giving a clean minimal appearance; undecorated half-circle gauge with only a pivot needle and smooth arc
fa-gauge-simple.functionalityId: displays a simplified gauge reading without detailed scale markings; represents a basic measurement or level indicator
fa-gauge-simple.intentId: show a clean simple measurement or progress level; use a minimal gauge display for a performance metric

fa-gauge-simple-max.appearanceId: a plain semicircular dial outline with a needle deflected fully to the maximum right-side position and no tick marks; clean half-circle gauge with only a pivot needle at the top end of the arc
fa-gauge-simple-max.functionalityId: indicates a maximum reading on a simplified gauge without scale markers; marks full capacity on a minimal dial display
fa-gauge-simple-max.intentId: show that a metric has reached its maximum on a clean gauge display; confirm full capacity in a simplified measurement view

fa-gauge-simple-min.appearanceId: a plain semicircular dial outline with a needle deflected fully to the minimum left-side position and no tick marks; clean half-circle gauge with only a pivot needle at the bottom end of the arc
fa-gauge-simple-min.functionalityId: indicates a minimum reading on a simplified gauge without scale markers; marks empty or zero state on a minimal dial display
fa-gauge-simple-min.intentId: show that a metric is at its minimum on a clean gauge display; confirm an empty or zero state in a simplified measurement view

fa-gave-dandy.appearanceId: a decorative plant or flower with a distinctive dandelion-like puffball head and a slender stem with small leaves; rounded seed-head silhouette atop a thin stalk with leaf protrusions
fa-gave-dandy.functionalityId: represents a dandelion or wildflower plant in a nature or garden context; marks content related to wildflowers or seeds
fa-gave-dandy.intentId: explore nature or garden content featuring dandelions; identify or categorize wildflower-related items

fa-gavel.appearanceId: a wooden judge's mallet with a cylindrical head and a long handle, often shown at an angle as if striking; rectangular hammer head on a tapered handle depicted mid-swing
fa-gavel.functionalityId: finalizes a decision or confirms an auction bid; marks an item as approved or officially ruled upon
fa-gavel.intentId: finalize a legal or official decision; close an auction or authorize a formal action

fa-gbp.appearanceId: a stylized pound sterling symbol consisting of a bold capital L shape with one or two horizontal crossbars through the upper stem; decorative currency letterform with a horizontal stripe
fa-gbp.functionalityId: represents or selects British pound sterling as the currency; displays a price or value in GBP
fa-gbp.intentId: work with British pound sterling pricing or currency conversion; display or set a GBP monetary value

fa-gear-code.appearanceId: a single toothed gear wheel outline with angle bracket or code symbols displayed in the center hub area; cog silhouette with less-than and greater-than bracket marks inside
fa-gear-code.functionalityId: opens code-related settings or a developer configuration panel; accesses gear-level coding or build settings
fa-gear-code.intentId: configure developer or code-related system settings; access gear-level options for a software development workflow

fa-gear-complex.appearanceId: two or more interlocking toothed gear wheels of different sizes meshed together; a large cog and a smaller cog with teeth interlocked side by side
fa-gear-complex.functionalityId: represents a complex mechanical or system configuration; opens advanced multi-component settings or automation rules
fa-gear-complex.intentId: manage complex system configuration or multi-part automation; access advanced interlocking process settings

fa-gear-complex-code.appearanceId: two interlocking toothed gear wheels with code bracket symbols visible inside one of the gear hubs; paired cog silhouette with angle bracket code marks in the center of one gear
fa-gear-complex-code.functionalityId: opens advanced developer settings involving multiple system components; accesses complex code-driven gear-level configuration
fa-gear-complex-code.intentId: configure a complex multi-component developer or code system; manage interlocking software build or automation settings

fa-gem.appearanceId: a faceted diamond or gemstone shape with a flat top table, angled crown facets, and a pointed or flat pavilion base; multifaceted jewel outline with a classic cut diamond silhouette
fa-gem.functionalityId: represents a premium or high-value item or tier; marks content as a gem, treasure, or top-quality asset
fa-gem.intentId: identify a premium feature or high-value item; upgrade to a gem-tier plan or mark something as a top asset

fa-genderless.appearanceId: a simple circle outline with no directional arrow or cross, representing a neutral gender symbol; plain round ring with no attached directional or cross extension
fa-genderless.functionalityId: represents a genderless or non-binary gender identity; marks a profile or form field as genderless
fa-genderless.intentId: indicate a genderless or non-binary identity; select or display a neutral gender option in a profile or form

fa-ghost.appearanceId: a rounded ghost silhouette with a dome-shaped head, two dot eyes, and wavy or scalloped bottom edge tentacles; floating spirit shape with a smooth top and uneven bottom fringe
fa-ghost.functionalityId: represents a ghost or hidden mode in an application; indicates an invisible or stealth presence status
fa-ghost.intentId: activate ghost or invisible mode; indicate a hidden or incognito presence in a system

fa-gif.appearanceId: the three uppercase letters G, I, F arranged as a text label badge; blocky sans-serif GIF text mark with no additional imagery
fa-gif.functionalityId: inserts or opens an animated GIF image; navigates to a GIF search or media picker
fa-gif.intentId: find and share an animated GIF; add a GIF to a message or post

fa-gift.appearanceId: a rectangular box with a lid, wrapped in a bow on top with ribbon loops and trailing ends; present package outline with a tied bow and vertical ribbon stripe down the middle
fa-gift.functionalityId: sends or opens a gift or reward; navigates to a promotions or gifting section
fa-gift.intentId: send a gift or reward to another user; access promotions or gift-related features

fa-gift-card.appearanceId: a flat rectangular card resembling a credit card with a bow or ribbon design printed on the surface; payment card silhouette with a gift bow graphic in the center
fa-gift-card.functionalityId: applies or manages a gift card balance or code; navigates to a gift card redemption or purchase page
fa-gift-card.intentId: redeem or purchase a gift card; manage gift card balances in a checkout or wallet

fa-gifts.appearanceId: two or more wrapped gift boxes of different sizes stacked or grouped together, each with ribbons and bows; a cluster of present packages with tied bows arranged as a group
fa-gifts.functionalityId: navigates to a gift registry or multiple-gift management section; displays a collection of gifts or rewards
fa-gifts.intentId: browse or manage a collection of gifts; access a gift registry or holiday gifting feature

fa-gingerbread-man.appearanceId: a humanoid cookie silhouette with a rounded head, outstretched arms, and two leg stumps in the classic gingerbread man cutout shape; flat biscuit figure with a rounded head and simple limb stubs
fa-gingerbread-man.functionalityId: represents a holiday or Christmas-themed decoration or treat; marks seasonal baking or festive content
fa-gingerbread-man.intentId: access holiday baking or Christmas-themed content; find seasonal recipes or festive decorations

fa-glass.appearanceId: a simple tall drinking glass with straight or slightly tapered walls and no stem; plain cylindrical tumbler outline with an open top
fa-glass.functionalityId: represents a beverage or drink item in a menu or recipe; marks a drink order or glass container
fa-glass.intentId: find drink or beverage options; mark a container as a glass for a recipe or menu

fa-glass-cheers.appearanceId: two stemmed wine or champagne glasses clinking together with small splash lines at the tops; a pair of goblets touching rim-to-rim in a toasting gesture
fa-glass-cheers.functionalityId: represents a toast or celebratory drink; marks a social or celebratory event or occasion
fa-glass-cheers.intentId: celebrate a milestone or social occasion; find party or event-related content

fa-glass-citrus.appearanceId: a tall glass with a citrus fruit slice or wedge perched on the rim and liquid visible inside; drinking tumbler outline with a lemon or lime garnish on the edge
fa-glass-citrus.functionalityId: represents a citrus-flavored drink or cocktail; marks a beverage item as citrus-garnished
fa-glass-citrus.intentId: find citrus-flavored drink or cocktail options; add a citrus drink to a menu or order
